title: cyclopogon calophyllus
intro: Cyclopogon calophyllus, also known as the 'yellow galega' or 'yellow galega orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclopogon calophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
